steps: Contact RBC Investor Services to report overpayment of CAD 4,077.00 on BMO dividend (ISIN CA0679011084)
Request refund citing CA-NO treaty Article 10 allows maximum 15% withholding on 180,000 shares
Provide documentation showing correct net amount should be CAD 231,030.00, not CAD 235,107.00
If RBC cannot process refund, initiate formal dispute with supporting treaty documentation
